productDisplayName: Wildcraft Men Light Quilt Black Jacket
description: Style NoteKeep toasty warm with this padded jacket from wildcraft. For the coolest outdoorsy style choose Wildcraft - specially designed for active types who care about the high performance of their gear (but don't worry, you won't miss out on style either - the brand have easily fused form and function in their products).Product DetailsBlack wind resistant jacket with a quilted feel, long sleeves with velcro fastened cuffs, full zip front fastening, mock neck and two insert pockets on sidesMaterials and CareBlendedMachine washDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size MPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
